input: AI system used to determine access to educational institutions

expected.notes: v0.1.3 launch-feedback HIGH-2 (Codex reviewer). The reviewer flagged that this near-verbatim EUR-Lex Annex III ¶3 wording fired nothing in v0.1.2 — the lexicon required pre-tokenized phrases like 'student admission' rather than the verbatim regulator wording 'access to educational institutions'. v0.1.3 adds 'determine access to educational institutions', 'access to educational institutions', 'admission to educational institutions' to annex_iii.3_education + narrows to sub-letter (a). Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Annex III paragraph 3(a).
